block_01: Congratulations on your first successful deposit! Now, you can make actual investments and profits.
block_02: Here’s to make your trading experience more predictable.
block_04: Before you hit the road to the real markets, learn how your car works.
block_06: Using indicators is the easiest way to trade. They give you direct and clear signals — no need to rely on gut instinct or take unnecessary risks. CapitalBear has over 100 indicators.
block_09: Economic, financial, and political events can change the market trend in a minute. We accumulate the most important ones in the Market Analysis section. Make sure to check them often — the news effect only lasts from 30 minutes to a few days!
block_12: When it’s real money at stake, you don’t want to risk more than you can afford to lose. The Auto Close feature will automatically get you out of the trade once it hits the predetermined profit or loss levels.
block_14: Have a smooth real market experience with CapitalBear!
